data.body: Fix implemented: added Step 1.5 (Load Child Story Verdicts — Epics Only) to completion-verifier.md. The step instructs the epic verifier to treat closed child stories as inherited PASS for their SCs, and only re-verify SCs where no child story is closed. Step 2 updated to scope to non-inherited criteria only. 4 behavioral assertion tests written in tests/skills/test-completion-verifier-story-trust.sh (structural boundary tests per Rule 5). All tests pass GREEN.
